description:
Product Data Analyst
Location & Compensation
- Location: KL Bangsar South (Hybrid)
- Compensation: RM 8,000-14,000 Basic + Benefits
Why You Should Apply
- Join a data-first business intelligence platform and tech product company originating from Europe.
- Work on discovering hidden value in unstructured data that drives significant business impact.
- Be part of a process that emphasizes tracking, measuring, and iterating, rather than simply handling data in and out.
- Deliver actionable insights to corporate and enterprise clients, moving beyond standard reporting.
- Future-proof your career by developing as a full stack data engineer and analytics professional, gaining a comprehensive understanding of the data lifecycle.
Key Responsibilities
- Split your role equally between data engineering (50%) and analytics (50%).
- Identify and analyze trends, and conduct ad-hoc analyses to generate insights that support client decision-making.
- Collaborate with project managers and engineers to understand client needs, connect data sources, and deliver tailored solutions.
- Design, develop, and implement data pipelines to ingest and transform large volumes of data, and build scalable data models that power the core platform.
- Perform data integration and preparation, including ETL processes and data structure optimization, to streamline analysis workflows.
Requirements
- Educational background in Mathematics and Statistics, Analytics, Actuarial Science, or Data Science.
- Strong analytical mindset with a passion for working with numbers and converting data into actionable insights.
- Ability to define and solve ambiguous, open-ended business problems using exploratory and analytical approaches.
- Proficiency in SQL and Python for data transformation, cleaning, and preparation.
- Current experience in Data Analytics or as a Data Analyst, Data Engineer, or Business Intelligence professional, with a strong analytics background.
About the Company & Team
- A scaling European tech company with a Malaysian Engineering Hub, serving B2B enterprise customers.
- Specializes in niche, data-driven business insights tools for the cargo, logistics, aviation, and shipping sectors.
- Supports clients in making informed commercial decisions related to routes, maintenance, demand planning, operations, and forecasting models.
- Opportunity to work with global customers, with a European head office and a Malaysian engineering hub.
How to Apply
- Click the “apply” button to submit your application.
- You may submit an updated CV or simply share your LinkedIn profile.
- The recruiter is available to provide more information before you proceed.
Additional Notes
- Employment passes, work visas, or relocation support are not provided.
- Only candidates with work rights in Malaysia will be considered.
- This role is not suitable for fresh graduates; 4-8+ years of relevant experience is required.
